summary: Frontend testing completed for Buyer Wallet Feature. Tested wallet page (/my-wallet), balance display, topup form, and account menu wallet link. All core features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BuyerWalletPage.js correctly displays wallet balance with data-testid='wallet-balance'
Topup form (lines 199-291) includes quick amounts, min/max validation, and ShamCash phone input
MobileNav.js (lines 230-245) shows wallet link only for buyer user_type
CheckoutPage.js (line 19) includes wallet as payment option: {id: 'wallet', name: 'المحفظة'}
Wallet API endpoints properly handle buyer-only access restrictions

success_rate.backend: 100% (All wallet APIs tested via curl - balance, transactions, topup/request, topup/history)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Wallet page, balance display, topup button, account menu link all verified)

seed_data_creation: Test buyer account has 50,000 SYP balance (created by main agent). Additional topup request created during testing: TOP260319715A (25,000 SYP, pending)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buyer wallet feature fully implemented and working. Key pages: /my-wallet (BuyerWalletPage.js), Checkout wallet payment option in CheckoutPage.js. APIs: GET /api/wallet/balance, GET /api/wallet/transactions, GET /api/wallet/topup/history, POST /api/wallet/topup/request, POST /api/payment/wallet/pay. Test buyer account 0999888777/test1234 has 50,000 SYP balance.

details: Only accessible by buyer user_type (shows 'هذه الصفحة للعملاء فقط' for non-buyers)
Wallet option in PAYMENT_METHODS array (CheckoutPage.js line 19)
POST /api/wallet/topup/request - Creates new topup request with validation
POST /api/payment/wallet/pay - Processes wallet payment for orders
